title: Fabric Scissors, Dressmaking Scissors with Heavy Duty Titanium Plated Stainless Steel, Tailor Scissors for Cutting Fabrics and Leather, Purple, 10 Inch
features: The cutting blades of this fabric scissors are made of titanium-plated stainless steel and the handle is made of high quality ABS. Total length: 10 inches; weight: 130g.

Multi-colored titanium plated stainless steel cutting blades make the dressmaking scissors highly resistant to corrosion. Length of cutting blades: 5.5 inches; thickness of cutting blades: 3mm. Sharp & durable. It can cut thick fabrics and leather with ease and smoothness.
The ergonomic finger grooves of the handle fit your fingers well and allow for precise control and maximum comfort, saving your time and effort.
Professional scissors for cutting fabric, paper, etc. The long, sharp blades is designed for denim and polyester. Suitable for right-handed users.
Perfect for handwork, suitable for home and office. Ideal gift for your friends who like making crafts.
